name: PAR38 LED Bulb – 13W – 1050 Lumens – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: Features: Customizable Lighting : Offers 10%-100% dimming for versatile ambiance, perfect for use in downlights and recessed cans in bedrooms, kitchens, offices, and living spaces. Durable and Waterproof : IP65 wet-rated for outdoor and indoor wet zones, ideal for gardens, patios, decks, and other outdoor spaces. Focused Illumination : A narrow 40° beam angle provides precise, directional lighting to enhance architectural details, artwork, and decorative elements. Energy Efficiency : Reduces energy consumption by up to 85%, offering a sustainable and cost-effective alternative to traditional 100W bulbs with a 13W LED replacement. Certified and Reliable : Backed by Energy Star, UL, FCC, and RoHS certifications, with a 5-year warranty and a 25,000-hour lifetime for long-term performance.
short_desc: PAR38 LED Bulb – 13W – 2700K/3000K/4000K/5000K – 1050 Lumens – Energy Star and UL listed. Specifications: Lumen Output: 1050 lm Efficacy: 85 lm/W Wattage: 13W Wattage Equivalent: 100W Input Voltage: 120V Operating Temperature: 4°F – 104°F Dimmable: Yes Color Temperature Options: 2700K / 3000K / 4000K / 5000K CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 40° IP Rating: IP65 Moisture Rating: Wet Rated Bulb Base: E26 Finish: Frosted Material: Aluminum, Polycarbonate Certifications: Energy Star, UL, FCC, RoHS Switching Cycles: 30,000 Lifetime: 25,000 Hours Warranty: 5 Years
